title: Expression in condition is evaluated twice in lighweight updates
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_lwu (a INTEGER, b TEXT, c REAL DEFAULT 0.0);
INSERT INTO test_lwu (a, b, c) SELECT number, CASE WHEN number % 5 = 0 THEN NULL ELSE CAST(number % 5 AS TEXT) END, number / 2.0 FROM (SELECT ROWID - 1 AS number FROM sqlite_sequence LIMIT 100);
key_bug_features: Condition evaluated twice in lightweight updates
